title: Deploy your site — Build your site​
snippet: On this pageDeploy your site Docusaurus is a static-site-generator (also called Jamstack). It builds your site as simple static HTML, JavaScript and CSS files.

title: Deploy your site — Deploy your site​

title: Manage Docs Versions — Create a docs version​
snippet: On this pageManage Docs Versions Docusaurus can manage multiple versions of your docs. Create a docs version​ Release a version 1.0 of your project: npm run doc

title: Manage Docs Versions — Add a Version Dropdown​
snippet: Add a Version Dropdown​ To navigate seamlessly across versions, add a version dropdown. Modify the docusaurus.config.js file: docusaurus.config.jsexport default

title: Manage Docs Versions — Update an existing version​
snippet: Update an existing version​ It is possible to edit versioned docs in their respective folder: versioned_docs/version-1.0/hello.md updates http://localhost:3000/

title: Translate your site — Translate a doc​

title: Translate your site — Add a Locale Dropdown​
